Class Server

java.lang.Object
Networking.SocketServer
Server.Server
public class Server extends SocketServer
Main server class that accepts TCP connections and manages client sessions. Extends SocketServer to handle connection acceptance. Each client is handled in its own thread.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Server(int port)
    Creates a new server instance on the given port.

  • Constructor Details

    • Server

      public Server(int port) throws IOException
      Creates a new server instance on the given port.
      Parameters:
      port - the port to listen on
      Throws:
      IOException - if the port cannot be bound

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static Server create(int initialPort)
      Creates a server, prompting for a new port if the initial one is unavailable.
      Parameters:
      initialPort - the initial port to try
      Returns:
      the created Server instance

    • run

      public void run()
      Starts accepting client connections. This method blocks until the server is closed.

    • handleConnection

      protected void handleConnection(Socket socket)
      Handles a new client connection by creating a ClientHandler.
      Specified by:
      handleConnection in class SocketServer
      Parameters:
      socket - the client socket

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Stops the server and closes all client connections.

    • isRunning

      public boolean isRunning()
      Returns:
      true if the server is running

    • getServerPort

      public int getServerPort()
      Returns:
      the port the server is listening on

    • log

      public static void log(String tag, String message)
